violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a food storage container in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Food container was removed from the sink basin at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door low boy unit below the espresso machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door low boy unit below the espresso machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. PIC ordered new test strips at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces of equipment must be cleaned as frequently as necessary to prevent the accumulation of food residue, dust, dirt, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
